title: Air Pollution’s Daily Pulse Over the Northeast
summary: The TEMPO mission helped scientists track morning nitrogen dioxide that contributed to afternoon ozone along the New York–Washington corridor in May 2026.

title: NASA chief defends selection of all-male Artemis 3 crew
summary: During an event Tuesday at the Johnson Space Center, NASA revealed the astronauts who had been selected for next year's Artemis 3 mission, a flight to test rendezvous and docking procedures in low-Earth orbit with moon landers being built by SpaceX and Blue Origin.

title: Isaacman Responds to Criticism of All-Male Artemis III Crew
summary: On social media today, NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman defended yesterday’s selection of four men for the Artemis III crew even though almost half of the astronaut corps is female. Stressing […]

title: Artemis 3 commander confident crew will be ready for 2027 mission
summary:
The astronaut named commander of Artemis 3 is confident that his crew will be ready for what NASA has called one of its most complex missions in just a year.
The post Artemis 3 commander confident crew will be ready for 2027 mission appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: Curiosity Blog: Sols 4913-4919: Planetary explorers, freewheeling to the Yardang unit!

title: NASA Awards Contract for Construction Services in California
summary: NASA has selected multiple small businesses for the Western Regional Multiple Award Construction Contract, which supports a broad range of facility enhancement, modernization, and sustainment work at NASA’s Armstrong Flight Research Center in Edwards, California, NASA’s Ames Research Center in California’s Silicon Valley, and other federal agencies in the region. title: House appropriators back $55.5 billion Space Force budget, omit reconciliation funds
summary:
Draft defense bill funds Pentagon at requested discretionary levels but excludes $350 billion in proposed reconciliation spending, casting doubt on Golden Dome and other space programs
The post House appropriators back $55.5 billion Space Force budget, omit reconciliation funds appeared first on SpaceNews.

title: NASA, NOAA to Hold Joint Session at 23rd Symposium on Operational Environmental Satellite Systems
summary: Abstracts are now being accepted for the session, which will take place at the 2027 AMS Annual Meeting.

title: ESA at ILA 2026 – Day 1 highlights
summary: The European Space Agency (ESA) inaugurated its participation at ILA Berlin International Airshow 2026 with a day rich in high-level meetings, public events and strategic milestones, highlighting Europe's determination to strengthen its role in space. From in-space operations and services to Earth observation and planetary defence, 'Day 1 at ILA' showcased how ESA is working with its Member States, partners and industry to help shape Europe's future.
